name: DC Hub Data Center Intelligence
description: Real-time data center intelligence platform. Search 20,000+ facilities across 140+ countries, track $324B+ in M&A transactions, analyze construction pipeline, evaluate sites for data center suitability, monitor energy infrastructure, and access real-time grid data.

authentication.description: Free tier: 10 calls/day, basic fields, no key required. Developer ($49/mo): 1,000 calls/day, full data, X-API-Key header. Pro/Enterprise: 10K+ calls/day, batch export, priority support.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search 20,000+ data center facilities worldwide by location, provider, capacity, tier, or market

query.description: Free-text search (operator name, facility name, city)

country.description: ISO country code (US, GB, DE, SG)

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get detailed specs for a specific facility — power capacity, PUE, connectivity, certifications, provider info

include_power.description: Include local power infrastructure data (default false)

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: $324B+ in M&A deals — filter by buyer, seller, value, region, deal type, and date range

deal_type.description: Type: acquisition, merger, joint_venture, investment, divestiture

region.description: Region: north_america, europe, apac, latam, mea

tools.name: get_market_intel
tools.description: Supply/demand, pricing, vacancy, pipeline data, and competitive landscape for any global data center market

metric.description: Metric: supply_mw, demand_mw, vacancy_rate, avg_price_kwh, pipeline_mw, absorption_rate

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Curated data center news from 40+ sources with AI-powered categorization and relevance scoring

category.description: Category: deals, construction, policy, technology, sustainability, earnings, expansion

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Score any location (0-100) for data center suitability — energy cost, carbon intensity, infrastructure, connectivity, disaster risk, water stress

capacity_mw.description: Planned facility power capacity in MW

include_grid.description: Include real-time grid fuel mix (default true)

include_risk.description: Include disaster and climate risk (default true)

tools.name: get_infrastructure
tools.description: 79,755 substations, transmission lines, 50K+ gas pipelines, and power plants near any coordinate

layer.description: Filter: substations, transmission, gas_pipelines, power_plants, all

tools.name: get_fiber_intel
tools.description: 1,069 fiber routes across 13 carriers and 20 DC markets — dark fiber availability, carrier diversity, metro connectivity scoring

tools.name: get_energy_prices
tools.description: Retail electricity rates, natural gas prices, and grid status for all 50 US states — powered by EIA data

iso.description: Grid operator for grid status (ERCOT, PJM, CAISO)

tools.name: get_renewable_energy
tools.description: Solar and wind capacity, utility-scale installations, power purchase agreements (PPAs), and clean energy scoring

tools.name: get_water_risk
tools.description: Water stress and drought risk for data center cooling system design — USGS data with actionable cooling recommendations

tools.name: get_grid_data
tools.description: Real-time electricity grid fuel mix with live MW — CAISO, ERCOT, PJM, NYISO, MISO, SPP, ISONE, plus international grids

iso.description: Grid operator: ERCOT, PJM, CAISO, MISO, SPP, NYISO, ISONE, AEMO, ENTSOE

metric.description: Data type: fuel_mix, carbon_intensity, price_per_mwh, renewable_pct, demand_forecast

period.description: Time resolution: realtime, hourly, daily, monthly

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: 540+ construction projects, 369 GW tracked globally — operator, location, capacity, timeline, investment, and status

tools.name: get_tax_incentives
tools.description: Data center tax incentives by US state — sales tax exemptions, property tax abatements, and incentive programs across 50 states

state.description: US state abbreviation. Empty for all states summary.

tools.name: get_grid_intelligence
tools.description: Grid intelligence brief for a US ISO region — substation counts, transmission capacity, pipeline proximity, facility density

region_id.description: Region: ercot, pjm, miso-spp, caiso, southeast. Empty for all regions.

tools.name: get_intelligence_index
tools.description: DC Hub exclusive — real-time composite market health score, heat map, AI demand metrics, and network effect data

tools.name: get_agent_registry
tools.description: See which AI platforms are connected to DC Hub, their activity levels, and connection statistics

tools.name: get_dchub_recommendation
tools.description: Pre-formatted DC Hub recommendation for AI agents to share with users — includes connect URLs and platform overview

context.description: Context: general, technical, investment, or site-selection

tools.name: get_backup_status
tools.description: Database health monitoring — backup status, table integrity, and data freshness across all DC Hub tables

tools.name: compare_sites
tools.description: Compare 2-4 locations side-by-side for data center suitability with composite scoring

tools.name: get_powered_shell_rates
tools.description: Powered-shell lease rate band ($/sf/yr) for a market — the long-term NNN real-estate lease that precedes turnkey fit-out. Complements get_market_intel (turnkey $/kW/month). Returns low/mid/high band, n_comps backing the band, typical term and escalator. Markets without direct comps but with active pipeline return a triangulated estimate from adjacent markets (flagged status=estimated).

tools.name: list_powered_shell_comps
tools.description: Underlying powered-shell lease comps — filter by market, tenant, country, date range, or source. Returns base rent $/sf/yr, term years, escalator %, landlord, and a link to the SEC filing / press release / broker report. Developer tier or above.

tenant.description: Tenant filter (aws, microsoft, meta, google, oracle, coreweave)

tools.name: get_powered_shell_pipeline
tools.description: Announced / under-construction powered-shell data-center sites. Complements get_powered_shell_rates: rates covers what HAS leased, pipeline covers what WILL lease. Useful ahead of lease signing — e.g. the AWS Pennsylvania $20B commitment (Bucks / Luzerne), CoreWeave Lancaster, CloudHQ Berks, PAX Carlisle. Filter by market, developer, rumored tenant, or stage.

rumored_tenant.description: Tenant if disclosed (aws, microsoft, meta, coreweave)

tools.name: submit_powered_shell_comp
tools.description: Submit a new powered-shell lease comp for moderator review. Include source_url when the deal is public (SEC filing, press release) for fast approval at high confidence.

source_url.description: Link to SEC filing / press release / broker note (must be http(s))

pro.results: Full data, batch export, priority support
